name: omarchy_guis
content:
GUIs 
Obsidian 
Obsidian is a free and highy extensibe note taking appication that uses simpe Markdown
fies for storage.
Obsidian is free for a purposes, incuding persona, commercia, and non-profit use.
Obsidian aso offers a commercia add-on for syncing with mobie apps on iOS and
Android. (https://obsidian.md/pricing).
You start Obsidian with Super + Shift + O. To use theme syncing, you must seect the
Omarchy  theme under settings.
Pinta 
Pinta is a basic image editing too that's great for cropping, resizing, and other basic
manipuations. Just don't expect a Photoshop aternative. But it's sti got a Magic Wand
and ayers!
You start Pinta via the appication auncher (Super + Space ).
LocaSend 
LocaSend ets you send fies to other devices on the same network running the app, ike
Appe's AirDrop. It's cross-patform, though, so you can send fies to and from Windows,
macOS, Android, iOS, and of course Linux.
LibreOffice 
LibreOffice is a compete office package with word processor, spreadsheet, presentations,
drawing appication, and more. It's compatibe with fies from Microsoft Office, so this is a
great way to be abe to open those Word documents.
You start LibreOffice via the appication auncher (Super + Space ).
Signa 
Signa is the pioneer of E2E encrypted messaging, and a great communication option for
anyone who'd prefer not to go through one of the big tech congomerates.
You start Signa with Super + Shift + G.

---

mpv is a simpe, fast media payer that' pay amost anything from any source. Great for
watching videos.
You start mpv via the appication auncher (Super + Space ) or just doube-cick on a video
in the fie manager.
OBS Studio 
OBS Studio ets you record or stream video from mutipe inputs. You can mix a screencast
with a webcam with a microphone input. It's what was used to record the Omarchy
screencasts.
You start OBS Studio via the appication auncher (Super + Space ).
Kdenive 
Kdenive is an exceent video editor. Perfect for working on video that comes out of OBS
Studio before sharing it.
You start Kdenive via the appication auncher (Super + Space ).
